headline: A Look At ServiceNow (NOW) Valuation After Analyst Upgrade And New AI Partnerships
summary: ServiceNow (NOW) is back in focus after an analyst upgrade to Outperform coincided with new AI partnerships that expand its sales reach and address AI reliability, giving investors more to assess around the stock’s recent move. See our latest analysis for ServiceNow. Despite the recent analyst upgrade and AI partnerships, the stock’s 30 day share price return of 6.95% comes after a 27.07% decline over 90 days and a 31.28% drop in 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests rebuilding...
